name: flowstack-isms-governance
task: Implement the FlowStack ISMS documentation program from the supplied governance brief. Create a maintainable docs structure for governance, policies, standards, procedures, evidence registers, templates, and the SOC 2 control matrix. Cover the GUVFlow platform, environments, personnel, contractors, service providers, and vendors. Include the ISMS manual, charter, RACI, document control, core information-security policies, operating procedures, registers, templates, and a phased readiness roadmap. Ground every control and status in current repository evidence; clearly mark gaps and drafts, and do not claim operating effectiveness without evidence.

alternates.description: Build a user-facing feature across UI, API, data, and tests.
Validate API contracts, behavior, security, and failure handling.

workflow.output: clear docs grounded in current repo behavior
workflow.validation: run or verify every documented command where practical
workflow.recovery: if behavior cannot be verified, mark it explicitly

routing_facts: plan: Active Milestone: M006: FlowStack MVP Release

steps.reason: Ground the document in the smallest current source of truth.
Review commands, claims, and scope against source.
